data.label: Business Entity
data.description:
A registered business in the Republic of Cordova.
Business Context: Links to Employment, Maritime, Tax, and Property domains
Purpose: Complete business registration record

items.label: Business Registry Number
items.description: Cordova Business Registration Number. Format: BIZ-NNNNNN where NNNNNN is a six-digit sequence number assigned at incorporation. Required for all business filings, tax records, and port authority transactions.

items.label: Organization Name
items.description: A name of an organization (NIEM nc:OrganizationName). BFO alignment: organization is a material entity (BFO:0000040) that is a collection of persons organized for a purpose.

items.label: Organization Tax ID
items.description: A tax identification number (TIN/EIN) for an organization (NIEM nc:OrganizationTaxIdentification)

items.label: Business Type (Cordova)
items.description: Legal structure of a business entity in the Cordova Business Registry.

items.label: Registration Date
items.description: Date the business was officially registered in Cordova

items.label: Registered Address
items.description:
Official business address on file with the registry.
Purpose: Legal address for service and correspondence
Parent Cluster: Business Entity

items.label: Cordova Email Address
items.description: Email address using one of the Cordova national email providers. Providers: cordomail.co, novamail.co, portocorreo.co

items.label: Cordova Phone Number
items.description: Cordova national telephone number. Format: +99-PPP-NNN-NNNN where +99 is the country code and PPP is the area code. Area codes: Porto Sereno=100, Vistamar=110, Rioseco=120, Campoluz=200, Tierraverde=210, Montecara=220, Novaciudad=300, Piedrasol=310, Lagunavista=320.

items.label: Address (Line 1)
items.description: Street address line, building/apartment number, or P.O. Box number.

items.label: Address (Line 2)
items.description: Street address line, building/apartment number, or P.O. Box number.

items.label: City
items.description: One of the nine cities in the Republic of Cordova.

items.label: Province
items.description: One of the three provinces of the Republic of Cordova. Used across civil registry, property, tax, and all geographic records.

subject.label: Business Officer
subject.description: Person acting as an officer of a business entity (director, secretary, etc.). W3C PROV-DM Agent (Person) with appointment lifecycle.

provider.label: Business Registry Office
provider.description: Government office responsible for maintaining the national business registry. W3C PROV-DM Agent (Organization).
